name: SV Workflow ERROR HANDLER — Log + Email Sean + Workable Comment

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Set as errorWorkflow on every production workflow's settings. Receives execution.id + execution.error.* + workflow.id + workflow.name on any unhandled node failure.

nodes.name: Extract Error Context
nodes.notes: Normalize the n8n error trigger payload into our schema.

nodes.name: Lookup Execution Context (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Fetch candidate_id/email/session_id from execution_context table by execution_id. Empty result is OK — error handler still fires email.

nodes.name: Merge Context
nodes.notes: Combine error metadata + execution context into a single record.

nodes.name: Insert workflow_errors Row

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "workflow_label": "{{ $json.workflow_label }}",
  "workflow_n8n_id": "{{ $json.workflow_n8n_id }}",
  "workflow_n8n_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.workflow_n8n_name) }},
  "execution_id": "{{ $json.execution_id }}",
  "candidate_id": {{ $json.candidate_id ? '"' + $json.candidate_id + '"' : 'null' }},
  "candidate_email": {{ $json.candidate_email ? JSON.stringify($json.candidate_email) : 'null' }},
  "session_id": {{ $json.session_id ? '"' + $json.session_id + '"' : 'null' }},
  "failed_node": {{ $json.failed_node ? JSON.stringify($json.failed_node) : 'null' }},
  "error_message": {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message) }},
  "error_stack": {{ $json.error_stack ? JSON.stringify($json.error_stack) : 'null' }},
  "trigger_payload": {{ $json.trigger_payload ? JSON.stringify($json.trigger_payload) : 'null' }}
}

nodes.notes: Log the error row. neverError=true so email still sends even if Supabase write fails.

nodes.name: Send Error Email via Resend
nodes.notes: Email Sean. neverError so downstream Workable post still attempts.

nodes.name: Has Candidate ID?
nodes.notes: Skip Workable comment if no candidate_id (e.g., trigger error before context written).

nodes.name: Render Workable Comment
nodes.notes: Workable comment text — neutral, talent-team-friendly. Posted under Screen Bot member_id 1e62f0.

nodes.name: Post Workable Comment
nodes.notes: Workable POST /candidates/:id/comments. SCREENBOT_MEMBER_ID 1e62f0 hardcoded per CLAUDE.md §14.
